# howwarimpactsyou.com

## Description
Macro-to-consumer price impact simulator showing how wars, oil shocks, and currency moves affect everyday goods in 12+ countries.

## Data Available
- 5 conflict scenarios: Russia-Ukraine, Iran-Israel-US, Gaza/Red Sea, COVID-19, Iraq/Gulf
- 10 consumer categories: bread, dairy, eggs, rice, cooking oil, vegetables, meat, detergent, fuel, household basket
- 10 core countries with full coverage
- Impact model v1.0 (scenario ceiling at 100% pass-through)

## API Endpoints
- GET /api/data/wars - All war impact data (JSON)
- GET /api/data/rankings - Flattened impact rankings (JSON)
- GET /api/data/countries - Country list with coverage (JSON)
- GET /api/prices - Live commodity prices (JSON)

## Text Views
- GET /impact/{war}/{category}/text - Plain text scenario summary
